objective: Hybrid AI Academic Assistant (DB-first + AI fallback)

critical_upgrades.name: Hybrid AI OpenRouter Integration
critical_upgrades.details: Added AI fallback service with OpenRouter call path for low confidence and optional enhancement for medium confidence.

critical_upgrades.name: Confidence Scoring System
critical_upgrades.details: Introduced relevance_score + confidence_label (High/Medium/Low) with hybrid routing policy.

critical_upgrades.name: Multi-Chunk Retrieval
critical_upgrades.details: Retrieval upgraded to rank and return top 3-5 viable chunks with de-duplication metadata and soft fallback.

critical_upgrades.name: Strict Answer Formatter
critical_upgrades.details: Added strict academic output format: Definition, Explanation, Key Points, Example, Conclusion.

critical_upgrades.name: Reduce Over-Rejection
critical_upgrades.details: Lowered strict thresholds and switched to soft fallback behavior for partial relevance instead of hard rejection.

critical_upgrades.name: Answer From Transparency UI
critical_upgrades.details: Answer source now includes Subject → Unit → PDF and appears in chat details/inline source sections.

critical_upgrades.name: Follow-Up Question Suggestions
critical_upgrades.details: Generated 2-3 contextual follow-up suggestions and rendered clickable chips in assistant message bubbles.

critical_upgrades.name: Chat History + Smart Reuse
critical_upgrades.details: Extended history window to last 5 queries and applied follow-up context expansion for short dependent prompts.

critical_upgrades.name: Performance Optimization
critical_upgrades.details: Added chat response caching using Django cache + optimized retrieval path and capped chunk usage.

critical_upgrades.name: UI/UX Chat Redesign
critical_upgrades.details: Increased readability (font/spacing), improved bubble styles, sticky composer input, and follow-up chip layout.

notes: OpenRouter fallback is active when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is configured.
Without API key, system remains DB-first and uses safe contextual fallback.
